name: Forshmak
recipeInstructions:
1. Put 1 quart of milk into a bowl and soak the herring in it overnight.
2. Remove the herring, pat dry, and ensure all bones are removed.
3. Coarsely chop the herring.
4. Fry the onions in 2 Tbsp butter until golden brown.
5. Pan fry the ground meats separately and place into a food processor or blender. Add the onion, herring, and potatoes. Chop/blender until a smooth mixture is formed. Stir in the sour cream and egg yolks then add the spices.
6. Beat the egg whites until they are stiff but not dry.
7. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F. Grease a 2-quart baking dish.
8. Stir in the egg whites and mix until fully combined.
9. Fold in the egg whites at this point and turn the mixture into the greased baking dish. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese, dot with the remaining butter.
10. Bake for 40 minutes.
11. Serve hot.
